text: Entering this brightly-lit, modern environment, I feel a peculiar blend of curiosity and slight disorientation—perhaps due to the tilted perspectives and glass reflections. The neon light and the "R+D" wall suggest innovation and exploration, stirring a sense of anticipation within me. The reflective surfaces and nearby text provoke thoughts on transparency, progress, and the boundaries between the observer and the observed. I am both part of the exhibit and a spectator, wondering how human ingenuity manifestly shapes the spaces we inhabit.
